evidence_summary: Establish a high-contrast transition from domestic prosperity in the Helium gardens to planetary-scale catastrophe following news of a political assassination.

John Carter and Dejah Thoris enjoy a period of prosperity and domestic bliss in Helium, awaiting their child's hatching. This peace is shattered by news that the Keeper of the Atmosphere Plant has been murdered, causing the planetary air pressure to plummet.
John Carter and Dejah Thoris in a relaxed, intimate posture amidst lush greenery.

Domestic bliss is interrupted by news of the Keeper's murder and plummeting air pressure.
